---
title: "Ellen Rayne Garnett"
---

## Ellen Rayne Garnett

**Dates:** (1840-1924)

### Description

governess, would-be contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

She was governess to the children of Philip Wynter,  president of St Johns College Oxford in 1861.  She was evidently daughter of the Rev. Richard Garnett (1789-1850), assistant keeper of printed books at the British Museum, and sister of Richard Garnett (1835-1906), keeper of printed books at the British Museum,  for she was staying with the latter in the 1871 census and still a governess.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 6th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
